input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests use --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED for specific Jackson/ClassUtil introspection paths; dropping that while preserving those exact tests may expose reflective-access failures, but it is not required before ordinary meaningful coverage is reachable.
The reported failure is an assertion mismatch in JacksonAnnotationIntrospector enum-name behavior after the shaded Jackson upgrade, not evidence of missing setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0 is a self-contained shaded Jackson bundle used in-process by Parquet; the resolved artifact has no runtime Maven dependencies beyond JDK modules and does not require a service container, external system, environment variable, or system property for meaningful ObjectMapper/shaded-Jackson coverage.
